signals.title: USD/JPY — Geopolitical + Carry
signals.text: Japan FinMin Katayama warns of decisive action on speculation; 300bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains USD/JPY bid at 159.82. Intervention risk on a break above 160.00; JPY COT LF short −65,309. Carry dominates until VIX > 25; 160.00 is the key intervention threshold.

signals.title: AUD/USD — Positioning + Vol
signals.text: AUD/USD COT LF net long +41,675 vs HV30 at 8.2% and ATM IV at 9.4%. 25d RR at −0.14: mild put skew despite bullish price trend — market hedging rather than chasing. Late-trend caution signal; CFTC LF delta turning positive would invalidate the caution read.

signals.title: EUR/USD — G8 Bilateral Theme + Carry
signals.text: EUR leads G8 laggards (−0.496% avg, 7 pairs) while USD outperforms (+0.498%). G8 spread: 0.994%; Fed 3.75% vs ECB 2% — 175bp carry advantage drives the divergence. EUR/USD at 1.1681.

signals.title: GBP/USD — CB + Technical
signals.text: BoE 3.75% vs Fed 3.75% — 0bp GBP carry premium; BoE hike expected. GBP LF net long +28,426; AM constructive — positioning aligned with carry read. GBP/USD at 1.3458; 1.3500 is the next resistance.

signals.title: NZD/USD — COT vs OIS Divergence + RBNZ
signals.text: NZD/USD COT LF net short −17,090 vs RBNZ hike 100% priced for 27 May. If RBNZ delivers or signals hike, short-squeeze risk is elevated — crowded spec short unwind targets 0.5900+. NZD/USD at 0.5848.
